name: Spiced Salt (Chinese Spice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dry roast the salt and Sichuan pepper in a heavy frying pan over medium heat until the Sichuan pepper darkens.
2. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
3. Grind the cooled mixture into a fine powder.
4. Store the ground spice in an airtight container for up to 4 months.
This spiced salt is served in small bowls and used as a dip for raw or deep-fried vegetables, roast meat, and poultry.
